sentences.english: The worst jet lag I ever had was flying from London to Tokyo.
sentences.korean: 최악의 시차증은 런던에서 도쿄로 갈 때였어요.

sentences.english: I was awake at three AM for a whole week.
I try to adjust to the local time immediately by staying awake until bedtime.

sentences.korean: 취침 시간까지 깨어 있으면서요. 힘들지만 효과가 있어요.

sentences.english: I drink a lot of water on the plane and avoid caffeine, and that seems to help with jet lag.
sentences.korean: 비행기에서 물을 많이 마시고 카페인을 피해요. 시차증에 도움이 되는 것 같아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
